summary: Testing iteration 32 complete: 3 new features verified - (1) Minimap removed from Quest Map, (2) SP-based subscription purchase working, (3) PLAN_LIMITS verified. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: SP purchase endpoint POST /api/subscription/buy-with-sp correctly implemented
SP_PLAN_COSTS defined in backend: plus=10000, pro=30000, ultra=50000
SP_PLAN_COSTS also defined in Dashboard.js frontend matching backend values
Error messages in Turkish for insufficient SP and same/lower plan
Minimap completely removed from QuestMap.js - only 1 canvas element remains
SP balance banner in subscription modal shows user's current SP
SP purchase buttons show correct costs with thousands separator
SP buttons disabled (opacity=0.4) when user has insufficient SP
Cannot buy same or lower plan - returns 'Zaten bu plan' error
PLAN_LIMITS verified: free=20 credits, plus=100 credits, pro=250 credits, ultra=1000 credits
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 tested SP-based subscription purchase. User test2@test.com is on Plus plan with 405 SP. SP purchase costs: plus=10000SP, pro=30000SP, ultra=50000SP. Quest Map minimap was removed - only 1 canvas remains. Key test IDs: sp-balance-banner, buy-sp-plus, buy-sp-pro, buy-sp-ultra, select-plan-plus/pro/ultra. Backend APIs: GET /api/subscription, POST /api/subscription (money), POST /api/subscription/buy-with-sp (SP purchase), GET /api/usage (returns limits). SP stored in users.quest_xp field.

minimap_removal.quest_map_functions: PASSED - Zoom, search, SP badge all working

sp_purchase_backend.invalid_plan_error: PASSED - Returns 400 for invalid plan names
sp_purchase_backend.same_plan_error: PASSED - Returns 400 'Zaten bu plan veya daha ust'

sp_purchase_frontend.sp_balance_banner: PASSED - Shows 'X SP - SP ile de plan alabilirsiniz'
sp_purchase_frontend.sp_buttons_visible: PASSED - Each plan card shows SP purchase button
sp_purchase_frontend.sp_cost_display: PASSED - Shows '50,000 SP ile Al' format
sp_purchase_frontend.current_plan_no_sp_button: PASSED - No SP button for current plan

mocked_apis.Google Drive: MOCKED - Google Drive integration is mocked
